WeatherTool: Get current weather conditions and short-range forecasts for any city worldwide.
FinanceTool: Real-time stock quotes, market news, and financial data on equities, ETFs, and crypto.
ResearchHelper: Search academic papers, citations, and scholarly articles across major databases.
NewsTool: Fetch the latest world headlines, breaking news, and topic-specific articles.
MailComposer: Draft and send emails to a recipient with a subject and body.
RecipeFinder: Discover recipes by ingredients, cuisine, dietary restrictions, or meal type.
